title: The White Cliffs of Dover
writer: Claudine West, Jan Lustig, George Froeschel
actors: Irene Dunne, Alan Marshal, Roddy McDowall
plot: Susan travels with her father to England for a vacation. Invited to a ball, Susan meets Sir John Ashwood and marries him after a whirlwind romance. However, American Susan never quite adjusts to life as a new member of the British...
